channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: US-Iran War News LIVE: Indian Crew Member Killed After Iran Strikes 2 UAE Tankers In Hormuz
item.description: US-Iran War Live Updates: The flare-up is the latest to undermine an interim agreement between Washington and Tehran aimed at ending their war, which has caused global economic shockwaves since it began in late February.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War Live Updates: The flare-up is the latest to undermine an interim agreement between Washington and Tehran aimed at ending their war, which has caused global economic shockwaves since it began in late February.

item.title: Indian Killed, 6 Injured In Iranian Cruise Strikes On UAE Tankers In Hormuz

media:content.media:description: UAE condemned the strike as a serious violation of international law

item.description: The latest attacks come as Iran and the US compete for control of the Strait of Hormuz, through which around a fifth of global crude oil and natural gas supplies once moved in peacetime.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1127112/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>The latest attacks come as Iran and the US compete for control of the Strait of Hormuz, through which around a fifth of global crude oil and natural gas supplies once moved in peacetime.

item.title: 'Mojtaba Khamenei Is 90% Gone': Trump's Big Claim As US Strikes Iran Again

media:content.media:description: Trump's remarks came as the US and Iran exchanged renewed strikes over the weekend

item.description: Mojtaba Khamenei has not been seen in public since February 28, when he was injured in the same US and Israeli strikes that also killed his father.
item.content:encoded: Mojtaba Khamenei has not been seen in public since February 28, when he was injured in the same US and Israeli strikes that also killed his father.

item.title: US Man Solves 3x3x3 Cube Blindfolded, Sets Guinness World Record

media:content.media:description: The achievement surpassed the previous record of 11.67 seconds, which was set by Charlie Eggins.

item.description: Tommy Cherry set a new blindfolded 3x3x3 puzzle cube record at 11.56 seconds in New Jersey.
item.content:encoded: Tommy Cherry set a new blindfolded 3x3x3 puzzle cube record at 11.56 seconds in New Jersey.

item.title: Who Is Lindsey Graham's Sister, Chosen As Replacement After Senator's Death

media:content.media:description: The remaining term of Lindsey Graham's Senate seat will be filled by his sister, Darline Graham Nordone.

item.description: Lindsey Graham's sister, Darline Graham Nordone, has been named as her late brother's temporary replacement in the US Senate after his unexpected death over the weekend.
item.content:encoded: Lindsey Graham's sister, Darline Graham Nordone, has been named as her late brother's temporary replacement in the US Senate after his unexpected death over the weekend.

item.title: Trump's Thursday Speech To Focus On 2020 Election Interference: Report

media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump announced that he will deliver a primetime address to the nation on Thursday.

item.description: US President Donald Trump is slated to speak on Thursday about newly declassified intelligence on foreign nations' plans to interfere in the US election in 2020, an MS Now reporter said on X, citing two unidentified White House officials.
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump is slated to speak on Thursday about newly declassified intelligence on foreign nations' plans to interfere in the US election in 2020, an MS Now reporter said on X, citing two unidentified White House officials.

item.title: Trump Sends Congress Formal Notice That Iran Conflict Has Resumed

media:content.media:description: The United States began attacking Iran on February 28, alongside Israel.

item.description: As the conflict intensified, Trump said on Monday, the US was reinstating its blockade of Iranian shipping in the Gulf and would ensure the Strait of Hormuz stays open.
item.content:encoded: As the conflict intensified, Trump said on Monday, the US was reinstating its blockade of Iranian shipping in the Gulf and would ensure the Strait of Hormuz stays open.

item.title: US Launches Strikes On Iran For Third Consecutive Night
item.description: The US military said Monday it had launched a fresh salvo of attacks on Iran, marking the third night in a row that it had struck the country, as a deal to end the war falters.
item.content:encoded: The US military said Monday it had launched a fresh salvo of attacks on Iran, marking the third night in a row that it had struck the country, as a deal to end the war falters.

item.title: Iran War: US Military Death Count Rises To 14, Over 400 Injured

media:content.media:description: The fragile ceasefire between the US and Iran has officially collapsed as both have resumed strikes.

item.description: Iran War: A total of 414 service members have been wounded, including a US Air Force member added Monday. While Iran and the US have resumed strikes, it is unclear if that is what led to the airman's injury.
item.content:encoded: Iran War: A total of 414 service members have been wounded, including a US Air Force member added Monday. While Iran and the US have resumed strikes, it is unclear if that is what led to the airman's injury.

item.title: Series Of Blasts Heard In Kyiv After Missile Alert
item.description: A series of explosions were heard in the Ukrainian capital, Kyiv, shortly after midnight on Tuesday, an AFP journalist said, after the air force warned that several missiles were approaching.
item.content:encoded: A series of explosions were heard in the Ukrainian capital, Kyiv, shortly after midnight on Tuesday, an AFP journalist said, after the air force warned that several missiles were approaching.

item.title: US Immigration Agent Kills Colombian Man, 2nd Such Killing In A Week

media:content.media:description: A federal immigration officer fatally shot a Colombian man in Maine on Monday. (Representational)

item.description: A federal immigration officer fatally shot a Colombian man in Maine on Monday, marking the second time in a week that US Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents have used deadly force.
item.content:encoded: A federal immigration officer fatally shot a Colombian man in Maine on Monday, marking the second time in a week that US Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents have used deadly force.

item.title: Yemen Claims Strike On Sanaa Airport, Houthis Attack Saudi Arabia

media:content.media:description: The Saudi-backed Yemeni government claimed responsibility for the attack on the Houthi-held airport.

item.description: Yemen's Iran-backed Houthis targeted Saudi Arabia on Monday, hours after the rebels accused the kingdom of attacking Sanaa airport -- the biggest flare-up in years between the two sides that threatens to upend a frozen conflict.
item.content:encoded: Yemen's Iran-backed Houthis targeted Saudi Arabia on Monday, hours after the rebels accused the kingdom of attacking Sanaa airport -- the biggest flare-up in years between the two sides that threatens to upend a frozen conflict.

item.title: Donald Trump To Address Nation On Thursday

media:content.media:description: Trump did not reveal the subject of the speech.

item.description: US President Donald Trump said he would make a primetime address to the nation on Thursday, in an announcement that comes amid a major flare-up of hostilities with Iran.
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump said he would make a primetime address to the nation on Thursday, in an announcement that comes amid a major flare-up of hostilities with Iran.

item.title: US To Resume Iran Port Blockade From Today Amid Escalating Tensions
item.description: The United States will begin enforcing its renewed blockade of Iran's ports on Tuesday at 2000 GMT, the US military said.
item.content:encoded: The United States will begin enforcing its renewed blockade of Iran's ports on Tuesday at 2000 GMT, the US military said.

item.title: "20% Too Much, We Will Be Fair": Iran On Trump's Hormuz Fee Demand

media:content.media:description: Iran also took aim at the size of Trump's proposed fee.

item.description: Araghchi's comments followed a post by Trump on his Truth Social platform, in which he laid out his plan for the strait.
item.content:encoded: Araghchi's comments followed a post by Trump on his Truth Social platform, in which he laid out his plan for the strait.

item.title: Ukraine, 9 Other Nations Form Coalition To Protect Europe From Missiles

media:content.media:description: The statement gave no time frame for setting up the defence system.

item.description: Zelensky and the leaders of Denmark, France, Germany, Italy, the Netherlands, Norway, Spain, Sweden and the United Kingdom said they recognised "the growing threat posed by ballistic missiles," which are harder to stop than cruise missiles or drones.
item.content:encoded: Zelensky and the leaders of Denmark, France, Germany, Italy, the Netherlands, Norway, Spain, Sweden and the United Kingdom said they recognised "the growing threat posed by ballistic missiles," which are harder to stop than cruise missiles or drones.

item.title: 20% Fee On All Cargo, Iran Blockade: Trump's New Hormuz Plan
item.description: The US president asserted that the strait is open and added that the US is reinstating the blockade to stop Iranian ships from entering or leaving the country.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1127024/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>The US president asserted that the strait is open and added that the US is reinstating the blockade to stop Iranian ships from entering or leaving the country.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | Trump's Quiet Turkey 'U-Turn' Has Loud Consequences For India
item.description: In a stunning policy reversal, Trump has decided to sell America's F-35 jets to Turkey, a staunch Pakistan ally and its closest defence supplier
item.content:encoded: In a stunning policy reversal, Trump has decided to sell America's F-35 jets to Turkey, a staunch Pakistan ally and its closest defence supplier

item.title: 1 Killed In Maine Shooting Involving ICE, State House Speaker Says

media:content.media:description: ICE had a significant presence in Maine earlier this year.

item.description: Immigration officials said in late January that they had ceased "enhanced operations" in Maine after making hundreds of arrests.
item.content:encoded: Immigration officials said in late January that they had ceased "enhanced operations" in Maine after making hundreds of arrests.

item.title: Video: US Strikes Iranian Submarine Centre Using Sea Drones For First Time

media:content.media:description: The strikes come at a time the US and Iran are exchanging fresh attacks on each other.

item.description: Three Corsair unmanned surface vessels carried out the strike at the crucial Bandar Abbas port. This was the first time American forces have employed sea drones in combat operations.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1127083/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Three Corsair unmanned surface vessels carried out the strike at the crucial Bandar Abbas port. This was the first time American forces have employed sea drones in combat operations.
